# OpenConstructionERP

> Free open-source construction ERP platform. AI-powered BOQ editor, multi-CAD import (DWG, RVT, IFC), PDF takeoff with computer vision, 4D scheduling, 5D cost modeling, tendering, validation pipeline supporting major international standards. 55,000+ priced cost items (CWICR) across regional databases in 20 languages. AGPL-3.0 licensed. Self-hosted. Created by Artem Boiko (10+ years construction cost estimation experience).

## Key Facts

- **Price**: Free and open-source (AGPL-3.0). Commercial license available for proprietary embedding and managed hosting.
- **Cost Database**: ~55,000 priced positions (CWICR) covering work items, resources (materials, equipment, labour grades).
- **Regional Coverage**: Multiple regional databases — DACH, UK, France, US, Eastern Europe, Asia.
- **Languages**: 20 (EN, DE, FR, ES, PT, IT, NL, RU, ZH, JA, KO, AR, TR, PL, CS, SV, NO, DA, FI, BG).
- **CAD Formats**: DWG, RVT (Revit), IFC — all converted via DDC cad2data pipeline to canonical JSON/Parquet.
- **Validation**: 46 rules across 5 packs — DIN 276, NRM 1/2, MasterFormat, GAEB, DPGF.
- **Tech Stack**: Python/FastAPI backend, React/TypeScript frontend, PostgreSQL, Docker, Qdrant/pgvector.
- **Founder**: Artem Boiko, DataDrivenConstruction (DDC) — Kraichgaustrasse 3, 76676 Graben-Neudorf, Germany.

## Core Features

- BOQ Editor: Block-based bill of quantities with assemblies, real-time totals, AG Grid.
- AI Takeoff: PDF/photo upload, YOLO element detection, PaddleOCR dimension reading, 5 annotation types.
- Cost Database: CWICR ~55,000 priced items with semantic vector search (Qdrant/pgvector).
- Multi-CAD Import: DWG, RVT, IFC via DDC cad2data → canonical format (JSON/Parquet) → BOQ.
- 4D Schedule: Gantt charts, critical-path analysis, milestone tracking, sequencing.
- 5D Cost Model: S-curves, earned-value management, cashflow, cost benchmarking.
- Tendering: Bid package creation, GAEB X83 round-trip, distribution, collection, comparison, awards.
- Validation Pipeline: Configurable rule engine across DIN 276 / NRM / MasterFormat / GAEB / DPGF, with traffic-light reports linked to elements.
- Collaboration: Real-time multiplayer BOQ editing via Yjs CRDT.
- Module Marketplace: Plugin system with manifest-based modules.
- Reports & Exports: PDF, GAEB XML, XLSX/CSV, JSON/Parquet, REST/webhooks to ERP/SAP/Procore.

## Standards supported

- IFC 4 / 4.3 (read), BCF (I/O for issues / viewpoints / validation reports)
- GAEB X83 / X84 (round-trip tender exchange)
- DIN 276 (DACH cost groups)
- NRM 1/2 (UK measurement)
- MasterFormat (US classification)
- DPGF (FR), VOB/B (DE)
- CWICR (~55,000 priced positions, multi-region)
